news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed Aegis Logistics' long-term credit rating at CARE AA (Stable).
Short-term credit rating retained at CARE A1, indicating stable creditworthiness.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed Aegis Logistics' long-term credit rating at CARE AA (Stable).
Short-term credit rating retained at CARE A1, indicating stable creditworthiness.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics saw a volume surge to 107.1 lakh shares, 58.7x its 2-week average.
J&K Bank, R R Kabel, Central Bank, and DOMS Industries also saw volume spikes on NSE.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics saw a volume surge to 107.1 lakh shares, 58.7x its 2-week average.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics Ltd will interact with analysts/investors on Feb 21, 2026.
Investor presentation is available on stock exchanges and the company's website.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics Ltd will interact with analysts/investors on Feb 21, 2026.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics to sell 75% stake in HALPG to AVTL, involving equity share transfers.
Shareholders' Agreement amended; parent gains no direct rights but can appoint nominee director to HALPG board.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics to sell 75% stake in HALPG to AVTL, involving equity share transfers.
Shareholders' Agreement amended; parent gains no direct rights but can appoint nominee director to HALPG board.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics saw a 28.1x volume surge to 13.11 lakh shares, rising 0.5% to Rs.703.15.
Latent View rose 8.3% with 15.4x volume spike; Delhivery, Craftsman, Torrent saw volume surges too.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics saw a 28.1x volume surge to 13.11 lakh shares, rising 0.5% to Rs.703.15.
Latent View rose 8.3% with 15.4x volume spike; Delhivery, Craftsman, Torrent saw volume surges too.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics' subsidiary signed a framework deal for LPG rail and bottling plant.
The 52.5 crore project is located at New Mangalore Port Authority.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics' subsidiary signed a framework deal for LPG rail and bottling plant.
The 52.5 crore project is located at New Mangalore Port Authority.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics Ltd to participate in Non-Deal Roadshow in London from 11th-13th Feb 2026.
Investor presentation uploaded on exchanges and company website; no UPSI to be discussed.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics Ltd to participate in Non-Deal Roadshow in London from 11th-13th Feb 2026.
Investor presentation uploaded on exchanges and company website; no UPSI to be discussed.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics plans 1.2 billion capex by FY2027 to expand operations.
The company aims to achieve a 40% LPG market share through this initiative.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics plans 1.2 billion capex by FY2027 to expand operations.
The company aims to achieve a 40% LPG market share through this initiative.

news.title: Aegis Logistics posts Q3 revenue of ₹17.2B, up from ₹17.1B YoY.
news.summary: Aegis Logistics posts Q3 revenue of ₹17.2B, up from ₹17.1B YoY.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics to hold Board Meeting on Jan 30, 2026, to review unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 1, 2026, for designated persons.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics to hold Board Meeting on Jan 30, 2026, to review unaudited financial results.

news.title:
Aegis Gas LPG to sell 51% shares in Hindustan Aegis LPG to Aegis Vopak Terminals.
Vopak India to sell 24% shares; total 75% shares sold for ~INR 1031.8 crore.
news.summary:
Aegis Gas LPG to sell 51% shares in Hindustan Aegis LPG to Aegis Vopak Terminals.
Vopak India to sell 24% shares; total 75% shares sold for ~INR 1031.8 crore.

news.title:
Aegis Logistics undergoes market reassessment due to mixed financial and technical signals.
The shift reflects evolving views on its operational quality, valuation, and trends in the gas sector.
news.summary:
Aegis Logistics undergoes market reassessment due to mixed financial and technical signals.
The shift reflects evolving views on its operational quality, valuation, and trends in the gas sector.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra saw 5.29x volume jump to 2.05L shares, stock fell 0.67% to ₹1564.9. Praj gained 5.2% to ₹352.5 on 4.05x volume rise.
Aegis dropped 1% to ₹743.3, Bharti Hexacom rose 2.2% to ₹1738, Chambal Fertilisers gained 3.4% to ₹451.4, all on volume surge.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra saw 5.29x volume jump to 2.05L shares, stock fell 0.67% to ₹1564.9. Praj gained 5.2% to ₹352.5 on 4.05x volume rise.
Aegis dropped 1% to ₹743.3, Bharti Hexacom rose 2.2% to ₹1738, Chambal Fertilisers gained 3.4% to ₹451.4, all on volume surge.

This outlook was shared during their recent concall update.
